label: SEN66 → InfluxDB
info:
Subscribes to MQTT topic 'sen-66-data', parses the SEN66 sensor payload,
and writes a measurement to InfluxDB as time-series data.

Expected MQTT payload (JSON):
{
  "pm1_0": 2.3,
  "pm2_5": 5.1,
  "pm4_0": 6.2,
  "pm10_0": 7.4,
  "humidity": 55.2,
  "temperature": 22.1,
  "voc_index": 100,
  "nox_index": 1,
  "co2": 412
}

name: Format for InfluxDB
Click 'Inject test reading' to simulate a SEN66 MQTT message without real hardware
